name: BoltGroup.BoltRotateSlotsEnum
summary: The rotation of the slots (the holes).

enum_values.name: ROTATE_SLOTS_ODD
enum_values.summary: The slots are crossed to odd parts.

enum_values.name: ROTATE_SLOTS_EVEN
enum_values.summary: The slots are crossed to even parts.

enum_values.name: ROTATE_SLOTS_PARALLEL
enum_values.summary: The slots are rotated to be parallel.
